item.name: VPC-LIST-LABEL-SELECTOR-SILENT — labelSelector query-param silently ignored
item.description:
Findings: LIST-LABEL-SELECTOR-MISSING.md | Status: Kachō decision (silent-accept)
Techniques: Negative path, Boundary

Probe (2026-05-04): YC VPC API does NOT have labelSelector at all (returns 404 if you build a different URL). Kachō accepts the query-param silently and returns full list. Documented as known-gap in LIST-LABEL-SELECTOR-MISSING.md — labelSelector is not part of YC VPC contract, so silent-accept is acceptable.

item.name: VPC-LOCALIZED-ERRORS-MISSING — Accept-Language ignored, no LocalizedMessage detail
item.description:
Findings: LOCALIZED-ERRORS-MISSING.md | Status: Kachō decision
Techniques: Negative path, Equivalence Partitioning

Probe (2026-05-04): YC returns details[] with LocalizedMessage (locale=en) + RequestInfo + (no BadRequest); Kachō returns BadRequest only. Accept-Language is parsed by YC (always returns en) and ignored by Kachō. Kachō structured BadRequest is machine-readable verbatim, while YC's LocalizedMessage is text-formatted; both approaches valid.
